- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition or modification
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI change

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed all issues
- [ ] I have run `npm run type-check` with no errors

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have run `npm test` successfully

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, TECHNICAL-PLAN, etc.)
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments to new public APIs
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG (if applicable)

### Git

- [ ] My commits follow the project's commit message conventions
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on the latest `main`
- [ ] My branch has no merge conflicts

### Infrastructure (if applicable)

- [ ] CDK synth completes successfully
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing infrastructure
- [ ] Environment variables documented

### Frontend (if applicable)

- [ ] Component is responsive on mobile/tablet/desktop
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- [ ] No console errors in browser
- [ ] Build completes successfully (`npm run build`)

### Backend (if applicable)

- [ ] API endpoints follow RESTful conventions
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] AWS permissions properly scoped
